reference: I have kidney stones and recently went to the hospital with a lot of pain in my left testicle, but it went away that evening. The doctor said I was passing a stone. It has been four days, and there is no pain really and no stone has passed yet. One thing that has me worried is that I am not producing hardly any semen when I ejaculate. Is the stone blocking this?
text: I have kidney stones, and recently went to the hospital with a lot of pain in my left testicle, but it went away that evening. The doctor said I was passing a stone. It has been four days, and there is no pain really, and no stone is passed yet. One thing that has me worried is that I am not producing hardly any semen when I ejaculate. Is the stone blocking this?
